title: antennaria dioica var. marginata
intro: Antennaria dioica var. marginata, also known as Mountain Silver White, is a perennial herb native to the mountainous regions of North America. It belongs to the Asteraceae family and is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and promoting respiratory health. Antennaria dioica var. marginata can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a popular choice among herbalists and natural health practitioners.
